tabs.interaction.label: Interaction
settings.autoResume.label: Auto Resume
settings.autoResume.description: Automatically resume the most recent session in the current directory
settings.power.sleepPrevention.label: Sleep Prevention
settings.power.sleepPrevention.descripti: Prevent macOS sleep during active sessions. Each level is cumulative — it adds the flags of all lower levels.
settings.power.sleepPrevention.options.i: Keep the system awake while a session is open (caffeinate -i)
settings.power.sleepPrevention.options.d: Also keep the display from idle-sleeping (caffeinate -i -d)
settings.power.sleepPrevention.options.s: Also block all system sleep on AC and declare the user active (caffeinate -i -d -s -u)
settings.git.enabled.label: Enable Git Integration
settings.git.enabled.description: Show git branch, status, and PR information in the TUI and watch repository metadata.
settings.i18n.language.label: Language
settings.i18n.language.description: UI language (applies on next screen refresh)
settings.i18n.language.options.en.label: English
settings.i18n.language.options.zh.label: 简体中文
settings.steeringMode.label: Steering Mode
settings.steeringMode.description: How to process queued messages while agent is working
settings.followUpMode.label: Follow-Up Mode
settings.followUpMode.description: How to drain follow-up messages after a turn completes
settings.interruptMode.label: Interrupt Mode
settings.interruptMode.description: When steering messages interrupt tool execution
settings.loop.mode.label: Loop Mode
settings.loop.mode.description: What happens between /loop iterations before re-submitting the prompt
settings.loop.mode.options.prompt.label: Prompt
settings.loop.mode.options.prompt.descri: Re-submit the prompt as a follow-up message (current behavior)
settings.loop.mode.options.compact.label: Compact
settings.loop.mode.options.compact.descr: Compact the session context, then re-submit the prompt
settings.loop.mode.options.reset.label: Reset
settings.loop.mode.options.reset.descrip: Start a new session, then re-submit the prompt
settings.doubleEscapeAction.label: Double-Escape Action
settings.doubleEscapeAction.description: Action when pressing Escape twice with empty editor
settings.treeFilterMode.label: Session Tree Filter
settings.treeFilterMode.description: Default filter mode when opening the session tree
settings.autocompleteMaxVisible.label: Autocomplete Items
settings.autocompleteMaxVisible.descript: Max visible items in autocomplete dropdown (3-20)
settings.emojiAutocomplete.label: Emoji Autocomplete
settings.emojiAutocomplete.description: Suggest emojis from `:name:` shortcodes and expand text emoticons like `:D` or `:-)`
settings.paste.largeMenuThreshold.label: Large Paste Menu
settings.paste.largeMenuThreshold.descri: When a paste reaches this many lines, offer a menu to wrap it in a code block, wrap it in XML tags, or save it to a file. 0 disables the menu (large pastes still collapse to a [Paste] marker).
settings.startup.quiet.label: Quiet Startup
settings.startup.quiet.description: Skip welcome screen and startup status messages
settings.startup.showSplash.label: Show Startup Splash
settings.startup.showSplash.description: Show the full animated setup splash on normal interactive startup without rerunning setup. Quiet Startup still suppresses it.
settings.startup.setupWizard.label: Setup Wizard
settings.startup.setupWizard.description: Show newly added onboarding steps once per setup version
settings.startup.checkUpdate.label: Check for Updates
settings.startup.checkUpdate.description: Check for omp updates on startup
settings.marketplace.autoUpdate.label: Marketplace Auto-Update
settings.marketplace.autoUpdate.descript: Check for plugin updates on startup
Check on startup and notify when updates are available
Check on startup and auto-install updates
settings.collapseChangelog.label: Collapse Changelog
settings.magicKeywords.enabled.label: Magic Keywords
settings.magicKeywords.enabled.descripti: Enable hidden notices for standalone ultrathink, orchestrate, and workflowz keywords
settings.magicKeywords.ultrathink.label: Ultrathink Keyword
settings.magicKeywords.ultrathink.descri: Let standalone ultrathink request maximum automatic thinking and append its hidden notice
settings.magicKeywords.orchestrate.label: Orchestrate Keyword
settings.magicKeywords.orchestrate.descr: Let standalone orchestrate append its hidden multi-agent orchestration notice
settings.magicKeywords.workflow.label: Workflow Keyword
settings.magicKeywords.workflow.descript: Let standalone workflowz append its hidden eval workflow notice
settings.completion.notify.label: Completion Notification
settings.completion.notify.description: Notify when the agent finishes a turn
settings.ask.timeout.label: Ask Timeout
settings.ask.timeout.description: Auto-select the recommended ask option after this many seconds (0 disables)
settings.ask.timeout.options.0.label: Disabled
settings.ask.timeout.options.15.label: 15 seconds
settings.ask.timeout.options.30.label: 30 seconds
settings.ask.timeout.options.60.label: 60 seconds
settings.ask.timeout.options.120.label: 120 seconds
settings.ask.notify.label: Ask Notification
settings.ask.notify.description: Notify when the ask tool is waiting for input
settings.collab.relayUrl.label: Relay URL
settings.collab.webUrl.label: Web UI URL
settings.collab.webUrl.description: Browser UI used by /collab links; empty derives from collab.relayUrl; explicit http:// is localhost-only
settings.collab.displayName.label: Display Name
settings.collab.displayName.description: Name shown to other collab participants (default: OS username)
settings.share.serverUrl.label: Share Server
settings.share.serverUrl.description: Share viewer/upload base used by /share (encrypted blob upload + viewer; links are <base>/<id>#<key>)
settings.share.store.label: Share Store
settings.share.store.description: Where /share uploads the encrypted session blob
settings.share.store.options.blob.label: Encrypted Blob
settings.share.store.options.blob.descri: Upload to the share server (no GitHub account needed; avoids gist API rate limits)
settings.share.store.options.gist.label: GitHub Gist
settings.share.store.options.gist.descri: Push to a secret gist (needs authenticated gh), falling back to the share server
settings.share.redactSecrets.label: Share Secret Redaction
settings.share.redactSecrets.description: Run the secret obfuscator over /share snapshots before upload (uses the secrets.* config)
settings.stt.enabled.label: Speech-to-Text
settings.stt.modelName.label: Speech Model
settings.stt.modelName.description: Local on-device speech model. Parakeet TDT v3 (sherpa-onnx) is the SoTA default; Whisper base/small/large-v3-turbo tiers (transformers.js) trade size for multilingual coverage. Downloaded on first use.
settings.tools.approval.label: Tool Approval Policies
settings.tools.approval.description: Per-tool approval policies. Set to 'allow' to auto-approve, 'prompt' to require confirmation, or 'deny' to block. Overrides are honored in every approval mode.
settings.tools.approvalMode.label: Tool Approval
settings.tools.approvalMode.description: Default approval behavior for tool calls. 'Always ask' auto-approves read-only tools only. 'Write' auto-approves read and workspace-write tools. 'Yolo' auto-approves all tiers; user policy may still prompt or block.
settings.tools.approvalMode.options.alwa: Auto-approve read-only tools; require confirmation for write and exec tools.
settings.tools.approvalMode.options.writ: Auto-approve read-only and write tools; require confirmation for exec tools such as bash, eval, browser, task, and ssh.
settings.tools.approvalMode.options.yolo: Auto-approve read, write, and exec tools. User policy can still require confirmation or block calls.
settings.features.unexpectedStopDetectio: Use a small model to detect when the assistant says it will continue but stops without tool calls; automatically prompt it to continue.
